notes: Browser smoke testing was attempted, but this sandbox blocked local file/http navigation with ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ADMINISTRATOR; static pathing, JSON, manifest, and JS syntax tests were completed instead.
Font binaries intentionally removed; placeholder folders retained so separate fonts can be dropped in later.

corrections.change: Repointed a/c/*.css to assets/css/*.css and a/j/core.js to assets/js/core.js in both profile pages.
Repointed all d/*.json fetches to assets/json/*.json.
Repointed all 23 game launch paths to games/*.html across the site manifests and mobile game module JSON.
Added css/ourspace-game-rewards.css for the reward overlay link used by all game files.
Added games/developer_v1.js local no-op stub for the only missing static game script path.
Attached onyx/onyx-widget.css and onyx/onyx-widget.js to both profiles and placed Onyx in the Chat Bot with DBT Skills page/module.
Attached js/ourspace-dbt-chat-attach.js to both profiles; it now resolves css/js/vendor paths from the actual root folders.
Updated old plugin and JSON path examples so they no longer point at removed folders.
Removed bundled font binaries and kept placeholder folders only.
